title: You can train today
message: Recovery risk looks acceptable. Train as planned and keep good form.

title: Avoid the same muscle group
message: You trained pectorals recently. Choose a different muscle group today or lower the intensity.

title: Take a rest day
message: Your recovery risk is high today. Take a proper rest day so your next workout is stronger and safer.

title: Check recovery inputs
message: Some recovery values look invalid or unusual. Review the workout date, soreness, fatigue, sleep, or weekly count before making a hard training decision.
